transcript: [0.28][S01] And so, my fellow Americans,[2.32][3.22][S01] ask not what your country can do for you,[7.71][8.12][S01] ask what you can do for your country.[10.59]
stat: warm, isolated, inference time (model load excluded), MTD_THREADS=8 vs torch.set_num_threads(8). RAM = Maximum resident set size (/usr/bin/time -v). Speedup range 1.6 to 1.8x measured across 11s/44s/132s (see benchmarks/BENCHMARK.md).
